question_text: Will US CPI YoY exceed 4% in June 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the Bureau of Labor Statistics reports that the US Consumer Price Index (CPI-U) year-over-year change for June 2023 exceeds 4.0%.

question_text: Will the Fed raise rates at the September 2023 FOMC meeting?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the Federal Reserve announces an increase in the federal funds rate target range at the September 19-20, 2023 FOMC meeting.

question_text: Will US GDP growth in Q3 2023 exceed 3% annualized?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the BEA advance estimate of US real GDP growth for Q3 2023 exceeds 3.0% annualized.

question_text: Will the US unemployment rate exceed 4.0% in December 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if BLS reports the seasonally-adjusted US unemployment rate for December 2023 is 4.1% or higher.

question_text: Will the 10-year US Treasury yield exceed 5% at any point in Q4 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the 10-year US Treasury yield closes above 5.00% on any trading day in Q4 2023.

question_text: Will the ECB raise its deposit facility rate above 4% by end of 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the ECB deposit facility rate is above 4.00% at any point during 2023.

question_text: Will US core PCE inflation fall below 4% YoY by November 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the BEA reports core PCE price index YoY change for November 2023 is below 4.0%.

question_text: Will the S&P 500 close above 4500 at any point in Q3 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the S&P 500 index closes above 4500 on any trading day during Q3 2023.

question_text: Will US nonfarm payrolls exceed 200K in any month of Q4 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if BLS reports seasonally-adjusted nonfarm payroll employment change exceeding 200,000 for any month in Oct, Nov, or Dec 2023.

question_text: Will the US dollar index (DXY) fall below 100 at any point in Q4 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the US Dollar Index (DXY) closes below 100.0 on any trading day in Q4 2023.

question_text: Will China's GDP growth exceed 5% in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if China's National Bureau of Statistics reports full-year 2023 GDP growth of 5.0% or higher.

question_text: Will US initial jobless claims exceed 300K in any week of Q3 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the DOL weekly initial jobless claims report exceeds 300,000 for any week in Q3 2023.

question_text: Will the Bank of Japan end negative interest rate policy before April 2024?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the BOJ raises its short-term policy rate out of negative territory before April 1, 2024.

question_text: Will US retail sales growth turn negative YoY for any month in H2 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the Census Bureau reports US advance retail sales with a negative year-over-year change for any month July-December 2023.

question_text: Will the Fed funds rate be at or above 5.25% at year-end 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the federal funds target rate upper bound is 5.25% or higher on December 31, 2023.

question_text: Will the US ISM Manufacturing PMI remain below 50 for all of Q3 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the ISM Manufacturing PMI reading is below 50.0 for July, August, and September 2023.

question_text: Will US M2 money supply be lower in December 2023 than December 2022?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the Federal Reserve reports US M2 money stock for December 2023 is lower than December 2022.

question_text: Will oil prices (WTI) exceed $90/barrel at any point in Q4 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if WTI crude oil front-month futures settle above $90/barrel on any trading day in Q4 2023.

question_text: Will the Euro Area enter a technical recession (two consecutive quarters of negative GDP growth) in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Eurostat reports two consecutive quarters of negative real GDP growth for the Euro Area during 2023.

question_text: Will the US trade deficit narrow below $60B for any month in H2 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the Census Bureau reports the US goods and services trade deficit below $60 billion for any month in July-December 2023.

question_text: Will the US House of Representatives elect a new Speaker before November 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the US House of Representatives elects a new Speaker of the House before November 1, 2023.

question_text: Will the US government shut down in October 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if a partial or full US federal government shutdown begins on or after October 1, 2023.

question_text: Will Donald Trump be the Republican presidential nominee frontrunner in polls as of January 2024?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Donald Trump leads the RealClearPolitics Republican primary polling average as of January 31, 2024.

question_text: Will a country with GDP > $1T announce a net-zero by 2040 target during 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if any country with a GDP exceeding $1 trillion officially announces a national net-zero greenhouse gas emissions target for 2040 or earlier during 2023.

question_text: Will Ukraine recapture Bakhmut before January 2024?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Ukrainian forces control the majority of Bakhmut city center as reported by ISW before January 1, 2024.

question_text: Will the EU reach agreement on the AI Act before end of 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the European Parliament and Council reach a provisional agreement on the EU AI Act before December 31, 2023.

question_text: Will India hold G20 presidency successfully with a joint communique at the September 2023 summit?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if all G20 leaders or their representatives sign a joint communique at the September 2023 G20 summit in New Delhi.

question_text: Will Argentina elect a libertarian president in the October 2023 election?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Javier Milei wins the Argentine presidential election runoff in November 2023.

question_text: Will the US Senate confirm a new FAA administrator before October 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the US Senate votes to confirm a new FAA Administrator before October 1, 2023.

question_text: Will Poland's ruling PiS party win a majority in the October 2023 parliamentary election?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Poland's Law and Justice (PiS) party wins enough seats to form a government without coalition partners in October 2023.

question_text: Will the US announce new sanctions on Chinese semiconductor companies before January 2024?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the US government announces new export controls or sanctions specifically targeting Chinese semiconductor companies or entities before January 1, 2024.

question_text: Will BRICS formally invite new members at the August 2023 summit?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the BRICS summit in Johannesburg (August 2023) formally announces invitations for new countries to join the bloc.

question_text: Will Israel's judicial overhaul legislation pass in its original form by end of 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Israel's Knesset passes the full judicial overhaul package as originally proposed in January 2023 before year-end 2023.

question_text: Will Nikki Haley poll above 20% nationally in Republican primary polls by December 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Nikki Haley's RealClearPolitics polling average in the Republican presidential primary exceeds 20% at any point in December 2023.

question_text: Will GPT-5 be publicly announced before July 2024?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if OpenAI publicly announces a model called 'GPT-5' before July 1, 2024.

question_text: Will Apple release a mixed-reality headset in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Apple officially announces a mixed-reality headset product during 2023. Note: announcement counts, not shipping.

question_text: Will Google DeepMind publish a paper demonstrating superhuman performance on a new scientific benchmark in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Google DeepMind publishes a peer-reviewed or preprint paper in 2023 demonstrating superhuman performance on a recognized scientific benchmark not previously achieved.

question_text: Will Twitter/X remain the most-used microblogging platform in the US through 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if X (formerly Twitter) has more monthly active US users than any other microblogging platform (Threads, Bluesky, Mastodon) as of December 2023 according to Sensor Tower or Similarweb data.

question_text: Will a self-driving taxi service launch commercially in a new US city (beyond SF and Phoenix) in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Waymo, Cruise, or another AV company begins paid commercial robotaxi service in a new US city (not San Francisco or Phoenix metro) during 2023.

question_text: Will Neuralink receive FDA approval for human trials before end of 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Neuralink receives FDA approval to begin human clinical trials and announces at least one human implant by end of 2023.

question_text: Will any AI model score above 90% on the MMLU benchmark by end of 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if any publicly reported AI model achieves above 90% accuracy on the MMLU benchmark (5-shot) before January 1, 2024.

question_text: Will US EV sales exceed 1 million units in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if total US battery electric vehicle sales for full-year 2023 exceed 1,000,000 units according to Cox Automotive or equivalent industry tracker.

question_text: Will Anthropic release Claude 3 before March 2024?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Anthropic publicly releases a model called 'Claude 3' before March 1, 2024.

question_text: Will Tesla deliver more than 1.8 million vehicles globally in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Tesla reports total vehicle deliveries exceeding 1,800,000 units for full-year 2023.

question_text: Will a major US bank (top 10 by assets) fail in 2023 after Silicon Valley Bank?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if any US bank ranked in the top 10 by total assets is closed by regulators or enters FDIC receivership after March 15, 2023 and before January 1, 2024.

question_text: Will Amazon's AWS revenue exceed $90B for full-year 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Amazon reports AWS net revenue exceeding $90 billion for the full year 2023.

question_text: Will Microsoft complete the Activision Blizzard acquisition in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Microsoft officially closes the acquisition of Activision Blizzard before December 31, 2023.

question_text: Will Nvidia's market cap exceed $1 trillion in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Nvidia's market capitalization exceeds $1 trillion at market close on any trading day during 2023.

question_text: Will WeWork file for bankruptcy before end of 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if WeWork files for Chapter 11 or Chapter 7 bankruptcy protection before December 31, 2023.

question_text: Will OpenAI's annual revenue exceed $1 billion in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if credible reporting indicates OpenAI's annualized revenue run rate exceeds $1 billion at any point in 2023.

question_text: Will any FAANG company announce layoffs exceeding 10,000 employees in H2 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if any company among Meta, Apple, Amazon, Netflix, or Google/Alphabet announces layoffs exceeding 10,000 employees in H2 2023.

question_text: Will the Hollywood writers' strike (WGA) last more than 100 days?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the 2023 WGA strike lasts more than 100 consecutive days from its start date of May 2, 2023.

question_text: Will Arm Holdings IPO at a valuation above $50 billion?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Arm Holdings' market capitalization at IPO close exceeds $50 billion on the first day of trading.

question_text: Will Disney's streaming services (Disney+, Hulu, ESPN+) become profitable by Q4 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Disney reports a combined operating profit from its Direct-to-Consumer segment in Q4 FY2024 (Oct-Dec 2023).

question_text: Will global semiconductor revenue decline year-over-year in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if WSTS or SIA reports that global semiconductor revenue for 2023 is lower than 2022.

question_text: Will Boeing deliver more than 500 737 MAX aircraft in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Boeing's full-year 2023 delivery report shows more than 500 737 MAX deliveries.

question_text: Will a peer-reviewed paper demonstrate room-temperature superconductivity that is replicated independently in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if a claim of room-temperature ambient-pressure superconductivity is published and independently replicated by at least two separate labs by end of 2023.

question_text: Will 2023 be the hottest year on record globally?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if NASA GISS, NOAA, or Copernicus declares 2023 the warmest year in the global instrumental temperature record.

question_text: Will the WHO declare the end of mpox as a public health emergency before end of 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the WHO Director-General declares the end of the mpox PHEIC before December 31, 2023.

question_text: Will an mRNA-based cancer vaccine enter Phase 3 clinical trials in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if any mRNA-based personalized cancer vaccine (e.g. Moderna/Merck mRNA-4157) enters Phase 3 clinical trials by end of 2023.

question_text: Will a new COVID variant be classified as a 'variant of concern' by WHO in H2 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the WHO designates a new SARS-CoV-2 variant as a 'variant of concern' (VOC) between July 1 and December 31, 2023.

question_text: Will CRISPR-Cas9 gene therapy receive FDA approval for sickle cell disease in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the FDA approves a CRISPR-based gene therapy (e.g. Casgevy) for sickle cell disease before December 31, 2023.

question_text: Will NASA's OSIRIS-REx successfully return asteroid samples to Earth in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if NASA's OSIRIS-REx capsule successfully lands and recovers Bennu asteroid samples on Earth in 2023.

question_text: Will global CO2 concentrations at Mauna Loa exceed 425 ppm in May 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if NOAA reports Mauna Loa monthly mean CO2 concentration exceeding 425 ppm for May 2023.

question_text: Will India successfully land a spacecraft on the Moon in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if ISRO's Chandrayaan-3 successfully soft-lands on the Moon during 2023.

question_text: Will NYC issue more than 30,000 building permits in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if NYC DOB reports more than 30,000 total building permits issued for full-year 2023.

question_text: Will US existing home sales fall below 4 million annualized units for any month in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if NAR reports seasonally-adjusted annualized existing home sales below 4.00 million for any month in 2023.

question_text: Will the US national median existing home price exceed $400,000 in June 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the NAR reports a median existing home sale price exceeding $400,000 for June 2023.

question_text: Will the average 30-year fixed mortgage rate exceed 8% at any point in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Freddie Mac's weekly PMMS shows the 30-year fixed mortgage rate above 8.00% for any week in 2023.

question_text: Will US housing starts exceed 1.5 million annualized in any month of H2 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Census Bureau reports seasonally-adjusted annualized housing starts exceeding 1.5 million for any month in July-December 2023.

question_text: Will the Case-Shiller US National Home Price Index show positive YoY growth for December 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the S&P/Case-Shiller US National Home Price NSA Index shows positive year-over-year change for December 2023.

question_text: Will NYC rent stabilization board approve increases above 3% for one-year leases effective October 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the NYC Rent Guidelines Board votes for a one-year lease increase above 3.0% for rent-stabilized apartments effective October 2023.

question_text: Will Manhattan office vacancy rate exceed 20% by end of 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if CBRE or Cushman & Wakefield reports Manhattan office vacancy rate above 20% for Q4 2023.

question_text: Will US new home sales exceed 700K annualized units in any month of Q3 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Census Bureau reports seasonally-adjusted annualized new home sales exceeding 700,000 for any month July-September 2023.

question_text: Will California approve more than 100,000 housing units in 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the California Department of Housing reports building permits approved for more than 100,000 residential units in 2023.
